category_sources: Official GitHub README describes MCPM as an open source CLI tool for managing MCP servers.
source_facts.description says this is an open source MCP server and client manager.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses MCPM - Model Context Protocol Manager.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository has a docs directory and an llm.txt guide described by the README as comprehensive documentation for agents.
Official homepage presents MCPM features and installation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository pathintegral-institute/mcpm.sh describes the CLI MCP package manager and registry.
Official mcpm.sh homepage links to GitHub for starring the project.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists server discovery, client integration, profiles, direct execution, and updates.
source_facts.description identifies MCP server and client management.
